name: gate_d_rag_hit
description: Release Gate D contract: a Task Atlas markdown knowledge source is indexed and then surfaced by tool_recommend for a matching query.

expectedContract.assertion: After knowledge_index_refresh, unreal.tool_recommend called with the sentinel query includes a knowledgeCards entry whose title, sourcePath, or excerpt matches the synthetic markdown source.
expectedContract.cleanup: Delete the synthetic markdown file and refresh the knowledge index again so reruns cannot pass from a stale card.

procedure: Write Saved/UnrealMcp/KnowledgeSources/TaskAtlas/gate_d_smoke.md with title Gate D Task Atlas Smoke and body containing UEVOLVE_GATE_D_SENTINEL_TASK_ATLAS_SMOKE.
Accept only if knowledgeCards contains the source title, gate_d_smoke.md, or the sentinel in the excerpt.
